hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.php) if [ -f './vendor/bin/pint' ]; then ./vendor/bin/pint "$FILE" -q 2>/dev/null || true; fi;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in composer.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit composer.lock directly. Use composer require / composer update instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
